heroHeadline: Laftagareen Re-Elected as Federal Crisis Deepens; UNICEF Warns of Catastrophic Hunger Surge
heroSubtitle: Southwest State's parliament re-elected President Laftagareen on March 28, cementing a tripartite opposition of SWS, Puntland, and Jubbaland against Mogadishu's constitutional amendments. Simultaneously, UNICEF warned that 6.5 million Somalis face acute hunger — up 1.7 million since January — as Operation Rolling Thunder continues clearing al-Shabaab from Lower Shabelle.
footerNote: Data sourced from ACLED, OCHA, UNSOM, AFRICOM, UN Monitoring Group, and major international outlets. Casualty figures contested where noted.
